arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man Utd: 3 key battles that could decide FA Cup tie
arts.sum: A confidence-boosting draw at Anfield last time out suggests Man Utd may make life more challenging for Arsenal on Sunday, with both sides potentially making changes ahead of midweek Premier League action. Amad once again proved to be the man for the big occasion last weekend, scoring the equaliser against Liverpool having broken the Reds' hearts last term in this competition with a dramatic late winner during a 4-3 duel.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal welcome Manchester United to the Emirates Stadium for Sunday's FA Cup third round tie between two of the competition's most successful outfits. Arsenal head into this cup tie having lost the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final to Newcastle 2-0.

arts.ttl: Jack Wilshere sends three-word message to former Arsenal striker who just made big money move

arts.ttl: ‘Immediately’ – Rush now on to complete Manchester United transfer, match shows why Red Devils man needed
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford again finds himself on the front page of Gazzetta dello Sport on Sunday, as AC Milan work to sign the Manchester United forward before anyone beats them to it. arts.ttl: Alexis Sanchez: Why did the Arsenal superstar flop so badly at Man Utd after blockbuster January swap-deal?
arts.sum: On January 25, 2019, Alexis Sanchez returned to Arsenal for the first time since joining Manchester United in a blockbuster swap deal involving Henrikh Mkhitaryan 12 months earlier. But this was Sanchez's night, not only because he'd masterminded his former club's downfall, but because it was the first time he really looked like a proper United player.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told harsh truth that speaks volumes about Man Utd situation
arts.sum: Nigel Winterburn has told Ruben Amorim that he need not worry about Arsenal swooping in for any of his star players in the January window, given the current state of affairs at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal will wear all-white kit against Manchester United in FA Cup
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's Arsenal team will line up in a special strip against Manchester United in the FA Cup third round this afternoon as part of club's anti-knife crime campaign

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal expected XIs as Premier League giants clash in FA Cup
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United will lock horns in the FA Cup on Sunday and both Mikel Arteta and Ruben Amorim are hoping their sides will go on to lift the trophy in May

arts.sum: Napoli could reportedly now be in the mix for the potential transfer of Manchester United misfit Marcus Rashford this January. It looks highly likely that Rashford will be leaving Man Utd this month, with numerous top clubs around Europe linked with the England international in the last few weeks.
